action.content:
Write a funny article about why the dinosaurs went extinct and put double quotations marks around your whole response. Include exactly 8 bullet points in your response. The bullet points should be in the form of:
* This is bullet 1
* This is bullet 2
...
action.label: context

action.content:
"
* The asteroid didn't actually hit; it was just a really bad parking job by a rogue meteor that got lost on the way to the moon.
* Dinosaurs were too busy arguing over who got the last fern to notice the sky turning a suspicious shade of orange.
* A massive volcanic eruption in Iceland caused a global 'no smoking' policy that the T-Rexes refused to follow, leading to immediate eviction.
* The climate change was actually just a very enthusiastic group of pterodactyls trying to start a new fashion trend with their wings.
* Scientists forgot to update the dinosaur operating system, so when the 'Ice Age 2.0' patch dropped, their brains crashed.
* A giant asteroid made of pure bad luck landed in the middle of the food chain, causing a ripple effect of existential dread.
* The dinosaurs tried to evolve into humans but got stuck in a loading bar that never finished, leaving them as the ultimate beta testers.
* In the end, it was all just a really long, very expensive reality show that got cancelled because the audience (us) found the acting too dramatic.
"
action.label: response
